name: Cheese Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Onion, pepper, & mushrooms (mixture of 3 vegetables)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lasagna noodles in boiling water until tender. Drain and set aside.
2. Combine tomato sauce and chopped onions, peppers, and mushrooms in a separate bowl.
3. Mix cottage cheese, eggs, and parmesan cheese in another bowl.
4. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 C).
5. In an 8-inch x 8-inch casserole dish, layer half the noodles, the cottage cheese mixture, and grated mozzarella cheese.
6. Top with tomato sauce mix and the rest of the noodles.
7. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
8. Bake for 25 minutes.
